message.content:
@startuml
participant Issuer as I1
participant Issuer as I2
participant Contract as C1
participant Contract as C2

I1 --> C1 : Revoke(h(Root_ct), reason)
I2 --> C1 : Revoke(h(Root_ct), reason)

C1 --> C1 : MarkCredentialAsRevoked(h(Root_ct))
C1 --> C1 : Event : CredentialRevoked(h(Root_ct), reason, timestamp)

@enduml
